name: Hon. Situmbeko Musokotwane
organization: Ministry of Finance and National Planning
notes: Key shareholder representative for all Zambian SOEs. Oversees dividend policy, financial oversight, and government shareholder directions.

engagements.subject: Annual Performance Review 2024
engagements.attendees: IDC CEO, IDC CFO, Ministry PS, Ministry Finance Director
engagements.summary: Reviewed IDC portfolio performance and dividend remittance targets for 2024 and 2025.
engagements.outcomes: Agreed on 2025 dividend targets of ZMW 350 million to GRZ; Ministry requested enhanced quarterly reporting.
engagements.followUpActions: IDC to submit dividend schedule by February 2025.

name: Dr. Denny Kalyalya
notes: Apex banking regulator. Primary regulator for ZANACO. Regulatory directives on capital adequacy, KYC, AML/CFT must be monitored closely.

engagements.subject: Annual Supervisory Meeting 2024
engagements.attendees: ZANACO MD/CEO, CFO, Chief Risk Officer, BOZ Bank Supervision Director
engagements.summary: Annual supervisory meeting reviewing ZANACO's capital adequacy and Basel III implementation progress.
engagements.outcomes: BOZ noted ZANACO's strong capital position at 18.2% CAR; affirmed Basel III compliance timeline to Q2 2025.
engagements.followUpActions: ZANACO to submit Basel III readiness report by January 2025.

name: Oumar Samba Mamadou
notes: World Bank is a major development finance partner for Zambia's energy and transport infrastructure. Active lender to ZESCO and Zambia Railways.

engagements.subject: Zambia Energy Sector Development Policy Credit — Progress Review
engagements.attendees: ZESCO CEO, CFO, World Bank Country Director, World Bank Energy Specialist
engagements.summary: Semi-annual review of the World Bank Energy Sector Development Policy Credit.
engagements.outcomes: World Bank noted satisfactory progress; USD 150 million second tranche disbursement confirmed.
engagements.followUpActions: ZESCO to submit Q4 2024 implementation report.

name: Hora Hoban
notes: IMF monitors Zambia's macroeconomic performance and SOE fiscal risks under the Extended Credit Facility programme.

engagements.subject: SOE Portfolio Fiscal Risk Assessment — IMF ECF Review
engagements.attendees: IDC CEO, CFO, IMF Resident Representative, Ministry of Finance PS
engagements.summary: IMF ECF Article IV consultation included assessment of fiscal risks from Zambia's SOE portfolio.
engagements.outcomes: IMF noted improvement in dividend remittances; flagged Zambia Railways fiscal risk.
engagements.followUpActions: IDC to submit enhanced quarterly SOE fiscal risk dashboard to Ministry of Finance.
